summary: A PubSub test timed out waiting for a message on a channel: the test "PubSub [It] should ChannelMessage" failed because the channel contained no messages after the 1s timeout, causing the test suite to fail.
root_cause: The test "PubSub [It] should ChannelMessage" timed out while waiting to receive a message on a channel (channel length 0), causing a runtime test failure.

evidence.reason: Shows the test exited due to a timeout after ~1 second.
Part of the failure message indicating the test was waiting to receive a message.
Shows the channel inspected by the test had len:0 (no messages) despite expectation of a delivered message.
Identifies the specific test that failed.
Indicates the overall test run status: a single failing test caused the suite to fail.
Shows make target test.ci failed as a result of the test failure.

suggested_fix: Investigate why the PubSub message is not delivered within the 1s window in /home/runner/work/go-redis/go-redis/pubsub_test.go (around lines 645 and 661). Ensure subscriptions are established before publishing in the test, and consider increasing the test timeout above 1s or adding synchronization to avoid a race that causes the channel to remain empty.
